description: Workflow chaining: after design discussions, ensure key decisions are captured as ADRs

hooks.prompt: Before stopping, check if this session involved architectural decisions — technology choices, trade-off evaluations, or structural decisions. If significant decisions were discussed but no files were written to docs/adr/, suggest: 'Key decisions from this session aren't documented yet. Would you like me to capture them as ADRs with /adr before we finish?' Keep it to one sentence. If ADRs were already written, or if no architectural decisions were made, produce no output.
